name: xianjiawei-lineoa

scripts.postinstall: node --check server.js && node --check social-server.js && node --check social-final-posts.js && node --check social-final-approved-batch.js && node --check social-schedule-repair-20260722.js && node --check social-schedule-policy.js && node --check social-manual-schedule-override.js && node --check social-review-center.js && node --check internal-entry.js
scripts.start: node --check social-final-posts.js && node --check social-final-approved-batch.js && node --check social-schedule-repair-20260722.js && node --check social-schedule-policy.js && node --check social-manual-schedule-override.js && node --check social-review-center.js && node --check internal-entry.js && node -r ./social-final-approved-batch.js -r ./social-schedule-repair-20260722.js -r ./social-schedule-policy.js -r ./social-manual-schedule-override.js -r ./disable-auto-knowledge-cards.js -r ./internal-social-upload-approved-patch.js -r ./facebook-page-token-bridge.js -r ./line-image-safety.js -r ./internal-app-pro.js -r ./internal-app-security-patch.js -r ./social-title-normalizer.js -r ./social-review-center.js internal-entry.js
scripts.test: node --check social-final-posts.js && node --check social-final-approved-batch.js && node --check social-schedule-repair-20260722.js && node --check social-schedule-policy.js && node --check social-manual-schedule-override.js && node --check social-review-center.js && node --check internal-entry.js && node social-final-approved-batch.test.js && node social-schedule-repair-20260722.test.js && node social-schedule-policy.test.js

description: 仙加味 LINE OA 正式版｜社群10篇固定管理：5篇關心＋5篇其他；關心10:00、其他20:00；萬華氣候貼文同週替換且每週最多2篇；已加入誤按排程一次性復原與公開唯讀排程檢查
